users.name: Susanne Clarke
users.bio: Head teacher at Borbville Primary – and best casserole chef in town 😎

posts.content:
Just talked to Mrs Garth-Clarke @ParkingSpacesLtd and told her to keep up the good work!
We need those parking spaces and we'll get them!
Ofc I know these kids that were attacked. They're anything but aggressive! Sweet little rascals, sure but they wouldn't hurt a fly!
I wish it'd be safer to let them walk there but we have to face reality. I don't ever wanna see mauled kids again!!!
If only Tom could be as diligent as you! You'd think at some point you start rubbing off on your spouse but alas...😜
Had a meeting with Susanne today, seems like we're ready to proceed with the plans! Only thing missing now is the mayor's approval – fingers crossed 😜
Yeah, I also wish he'd be a bit more like his big sister... Or at the very least on time ...sometimes

It's actually quite simple. We have 291 registered cars in Borbville as of today but only 300 public parking spaces – and that doesn't even account for tourists! We need those slots as soon as possible!

I'm taking my kids to school by car. Every day. No excuses. No exceptions.
It's the responsible thing to do, especially in times like these.
We.need.more.parking.spaces!
I certainly would be scared if my kids had to WALK to school now... there's no pavements, vile creatures attacking them – we're a car street, act like it!
PREACH!
You two shut up, doing my best here! And besides, I was merely two hours late last year!
There is no reason not to build those parking spaces, in fact, I believe we could do it in half the time, if only we say 12% more funding. Looking at you, mayor 😉
So what if we destroyed those beavers' habitat while building our slots? Two beavers one stone, right?
And while all those tree huggers are whining about their beaver friends, I'm thinking we could implement some anti-beaver auto turrets? Would certainly be a spectacle! 😂😂😂

Despite the constant negative press
covfefe
Look now, talking to people (who park their cars) in (the middle of) the streets, I realise there is dire need for more parking 😉
I think I hit something today reversing my SUV ... dam(n)
You say it, my man!
Horrible! Imagine the poor teachers seeing those kids arrive at school, blood everywhere, what an outrage!
If only the mayor was as diligent as you lot.

I saw the attack too! Only saw the end tbh but those bites and scratches were quite deep, kids took it like champs though.
Ofc I gave first aid, school folks help right away. it's nice to see the community work together, only that the circumstances were unfortunate.
It's such a drag having to look for a parking space for 10min+ every time taking your kids to school.
When the way to school isn't even safe anymore, what is?
The animals are too much. Letting them walk would be fine but come on... why is there nothing being done against them?
PLEASE!
I don't have time to take my kids to school every day. We need those animals removed!
Agreed.
That's not the solution either, is it? We need to solve this on town government level!
There is indeed. I've been parking on the street for ages but just because there's nowhere else to park... I read a study somewhere that said that more parking spaces decrease traffic as well?
Wouldn't mind seeing fireworks!
And we simply need the slots as well, so yeah, completely on board with that.
And even if it takes twice as long, what needs to be done, needs to be done.

users.name: Dr.Doolittle
users.bio: Political commentary – I'm the people's voice!

posts.content: I'm sorry but when kids are being hurt, there's no way around getting rid of those creatures...

I met one of their parents yesterday – they're traumatised! Never gonna let those kids go out again...
That is unless there's something done about the animals.
Yeah we need this badly.
While the way to school isn't safe, we can't let our kids walk there... Thus, more cars, more parking spaces.
Driving my kids now out of fear they could be attacked.
Or at least bigger streets? intervals? Idk, we certainly need something.
Also taking my kids by car now. Been thinking about other options lately but really, I'm just too scared.
Tourist season is horrible. There is no parking anywhere, I really don't wanna be looking 30mins for a parking space for a 10min shopping drive.
Hoping the new mayor gets to the bottom of it.
Do we as citizens now have to solve the issue?
This is another hazard for the kids walking to school.
Don't we have hunters in Borbville? Couldn't we just put them under a contract?
Honestly, you don't have to kill them, just "deport" them, right? Relocate them kind of.
I'd support this! Wondering where my taxes are going anyway...
Great call! Let's do it!
Can't imagine what it's like to have your own kid be attacked on their way to school! Nowhere's safe anymore!!!
Doubt they provoked those animals, maybe rabies?
Would speed up my daily life for sure! Not a carhead but we really need some relief here.
I'm not letting my kids walk to school alone anymore at least a group of 3 and possibly with at least one older child.
I mostly want those animals gone tbh – don't care where
We shouldn't be trying to solve this on the parent side – we need to do sth. about the core issue!
Simple calculation really – You notice it in town, sth. needs to be done.
Even the smallest contribution helps, I guess lol
Which in turn makes it so hard to get through with my car that I can't take my kids to school by car!!! It's a vicious circle!
Only a dead beaver is a good beaver.
Is it possible to put them in a zoo maybe?
Do it as quickly as possible! We need you!
Well, aren't you the sunshine here. Maybe start being nicer yourself?
Politics need to solve this issue. As of right now, we need to solve the beaver issue – relocation, eradication ... whatever is possible. That's for politics to decide.
Kids should be able to walk to school safely. Mayor, please – get this under control.
That's the point. Kids need safety, especially little ones! I heard an expert say that this is the most important for kids in their early years!
Traumatising for both teachers and kids!!! There's research into how harmful that is for school performance too!
It's scary as well, right? Like, if there's cars everywhere, you won't see the cars coming when you're crossing the street. Think about the kids!
PLEASE 2
I'm organising parents taking turns driving kids but that can't be it... This is not a long term solution.
The whole calculation is purely logical. This is not politics, this is simply a numbers game. We need the parking space.
BOOMBOOM
Yeah, slots are needed. And it's a plus if the beavers decide to relocate then...
Looking at you @Mayor...
I wouldn't my taxes going into that.
I saw those pic... Bloody hell.
Every bloody time!
I mean... that's what we have representation for, right? We are represented by people so that they can solve these issues for us.

Also, think about it like this – this is a long term solution as well. The need for parking space won't go down anytime soon. The beavers are just a current issue but more parking is gonna help us in the long run!
Yeah, I mean when a dog bites a kid, it's getting euthanised but just because those creatures are under what? Some sort of protection? they're being protected? ridiculous!
We could organise them going together or one of us driving them, taking turns?
And it makes the village so ugly too!
Yeah, we need to get rid of those beavers and then need a good system for taking the kids to school. Maybe more parking? Maybe bigger streets... idk but the top priority rn are the beavers.
Come on, this is a serious issue...
Should we really have hunters solve this issue? Isn't this a job for the government?
Really makes you wonder... This is such an obvious issue too.
Yeah, it's such a hassle with the lack for spaces rn.
There's kids being hurt... Why is this even a discussion?
This is a topic for police and ultimately the mayor... This is how governing should work!
This really isn't a time for panic. Ofc, the beavers need to go and we most likely need more parking but this is a bit much, no?
Makes it less safe as well... We need wider streets and more parking spaces just because of that – et alone the whole beaver thing.
Good call but this can't be our responsibility, right?
FULLY AGREE! This is not on us!
Just as the mayor needs to take care of the Borbvillers!
I think building the parking space would destroy their habitat and thus make them relocate anyway, right? I think I've heard an expert say that.
I think I've heard a vet say sth. like that...
Definitely. Politics aside, this just can't go on like it does rn.
Provoked or not – if they are attacking kids, they can't be near the school, right?

users.name: WideFaceWill
users.bio:
Carhead nr. 1
Best shot in town ;)

posts.content: The beavers need to be removed, it's dangerous for our kids, that's not worth a discussion. bang bang.
This is political inaction.
I don't wanna be driving my kids to school for the next four years because they're scared... Those kids should face their fears
Saw a picture of one of the kids, wounds all over, crazy. Didn't know beavers could do sth. like that.
I've been circling around the supermarket for 30mins now. It's a ten minute drive from home... This can't be what it's like.
yeah, second this as well!
We need a quick solution for them. Maybe the shelters have space? Or the graveyard? 🤪
I alone am three of those cars!
Some defence systems maybe? Is that really an option?
Same. Mayor, wake up! This is a pressing issue if there ever was one!
Yeah, saw that as well! Horrible! There were pictures going around too...
Might as well do it myself then... 😆
I don't get why people are downvoting this??? Think about the beavers too, this is the only reasonable thing to do, right?
Give me a rifle, I'll get on with it!
Thinking about just going out there every morning to protect the kids!
Meh, I can take care of it.
😆 those kids need to toughen up anyway
No wonder those kids aren't tough, all their parents are scared of some beavers lol. I'd take care of them, no problem.😆
Tourists and beavers both, just hand me a rifle lol 😆
Boohoo 😆😆😆
Here to do my duty! 🫡
Going towards tree-huggers lol 🤫
Oh I'd be down to contribute some more. Hand me a rifle and there won't be no beavers no more tomorrow! 🤫
put them *out 🤪
You're our only hope, mr. kenobi!!
"Carhead" here – yeah, we need them. No way around it.
Oh I'll provoke them alright 🤪 with a rifle!
You people really don't get the concept of humour at all 😆😆
Safety goes first here. Political discussion aside. I'm scared for my Bobby!
Kids should walk to school, it's healthy, it helps them get independent... this needs to be solved quickly, it's about their childhood being taken from them.
what a world we live in...
Saw those pictures going around. Brutal, really. Can't imagine if that were my Bobby!
There's so many cars everywhere. How is this not solved yet? Didn't we just have elections?
Or fewer cars but I don't see those going anywhere anytime soon.
Maybe we could set up a crowd funding?
Same.
Maybe audio signals at least?
There's need for sooo many slots!
School as well! Bobby starts so soon, can't make it even earlier.
Just had elections – This is the mayor's job. It's an obvious choice as well. There is not enough parking, the beavers are attacking our kids... PLEASE!
yeah I'm scared to have my Bobby walk there...
I'm scared of those creatures myself...
I'm scared for my Bobby! These are such frightening times...
Oh no! I hadn't thought of this! Another reason to be scared...
OMG ME TOO!
God no! Imagine hunters with rifles running about! It's bad enough with these creatures attacking our kids... Imagine one of them mistakes my Bobby for a beaver!!!
Oh god, yes, it's so scary! Bobby goes to class with one of the kids!
GOD! It's like war out there! All of this is crazy!
OMG YES! HELP!
OMG, can my Bobby please join? I can't be driving him every day!
But we need to take care of our kids!
I WANT MY BOBBY SAFE!

MY BOBBY WOULD NEVER PROVOKE AN ANIMAL!
Bobby wasn't involved but he goes to class with one of the kids that were and he says they wouldn't eve do that either! And my Bobby would never lie!
Why do you deny the people their parking lot then?
I agree! But nowadays it's just too scary with all what's been happening!
Brad, wouldn't you want to defend your kids when they're threatened? I don't buy it!

users.name: Betty Robertson
users.bio: Head of @GreenBorbvilleInitiative. There is no Borbville B.

posts.content: Parking lots are not an upgrade to the town – they encourage people using their car MORE. We should have more and better school busses instead. Build the town for people, not for cars!
We've been working towards a car-free town for many years. Building the parking lot is taking a huge step back. This is not the way to go!
Beavers have been part of our immediate environment of Borbville for a long time. Driving them out in any way would be disrespectful of our environment, not to say shameful!
As the summers are getting hotter, more concrete in our beautiful town, such as a new parking lot, would only further increase the temperature in the town center.
Needless to say, beavers are an integral part of the ecosystem. We simply CANNOT just drive them out. That would hurt the ecosystem tremendously, it's extremely fragile already!
Yes! #savethebeavers and #savetheplanet! There is no planet B, there is no Borbville B!
Thanks Donny. It's important we support each other in these difficult times.
Some days I just feel really tired discussing things online. Does anyone else feel the same?

Just to clarify things, we are not advocating for tearing up existing parking lots, just no more NEW ones. Especially if we disturb the beaver population in Borbville, which WILL happen if the mayor votes FOR the parking lot. I hope I made this clear now. Signing off for today, I need a break.
we humans have taken up too much space already. it's time to give back to the wildlife and LEAVE THEM ALONE!! #savethebeavers
i don't understand how people don't see how cute beavers are. beavers >>> children.
this 100%. seems like this isn't taught enough in school, or people have simply forgotten (or chosen to forget?) the fact that the ecosystem is CRUCIAL for our world!
take care, betty! lots of love. we can and WILL save the beavers and the town together.
this is the best description of the situation right now.

if instead of beavers, there were kittens living where the new parking lot is supposed to be built, would you kill them too? i guess not, so what exactly is the difference here? why kill beavers if you wouldn't kill kittens? think about it.
borbvillers, we are better than this. #savethebeavers and #noparkinglot!
i can't believe the way people are talking about this issue. i've seen people actively calling for simply shooting the beavers. wth is going on? #savethebeavers
You're talking about protecting kids on their way to school and your idea to do so is having MORE CARS around??? Just walk them there ffs
Carbrains would rather shoot wild animals dead than take a walk with their child

Word. People who still demand more car infrastructure don't know how nice the town would be without it. Talk about children and protecting them, lol. Who prefers their kids getting run over by a Jeep instead of them playing outside without fear?
tbh I don't care about the beavers, but #fuckcars so #savethebeavers count me in
Absolutely. Our progress in making Borbville car-free shouldn't be undermined. Let's fight for a better future! No more parking lots.
I'll forever be against whatever the carbrains support.
This whole thing isn't about beavers, it's our town's infrastructure that is at stake! No more parking lots!!
thx for clarifying what is really going on here. people need to see that fewer cars = better community
WTF? Why would we kill beavers for a parking lot? We could at least relocate them?
Hate to see the town so divided.. Can we just live together in peace? #savethebeavers
But would you kill the kittens though? I think Mary has a point there..
That's the spirit! Together we can #savethebeavers
Borbville is a great town and it should stay this way. It's important we talk about these issues!
Using "deport" is not ok, even with quotation marks. What is this discussion culture online? I'm disappointed in us Borbvillers.
Would love to tear up some existing parking lots ngl
Is relocation even feasible? Like also financially for the town?
Honestly, I don't think this is a good argument. Why would kittens live there? Where is the mommy cat? I think we should focus on the matters at hand and not fantasize about kittens.
#noparkinglot all the way! and #morebikelanes!
Protecting kids =/= protecting only your kids. If we eliminate cars, Borbville is safer for everyone. Simple as that.
And #morebikelanes!
Not everyone who's against your idiot parking lot is a tree hugger
The most simple solution is to eliminate cars. That's less danger for EVERYONE and we would have SO MUCH SPACE.
I for one would love to see my kids play outside more. All they do is play video games and be on social media. Kids, get off this app when you see this, understood?
Violence is not the solution! We need to be good role models for the kids!
Right on, Eddy. No one messes with the beavers!
WTH? Who's shooting animals in Borbville?!!
I love walking my kids to school, it's a great opportunity to connect with them.
No one should be scared in Borbville!
I actually agree with the idea of protecting our kids. It's just that people have different ideas about how to do it.
Link?
Wait what exactly happened? Who are we talking about?
WTH where can I report this guy??
#savethebeavers
beavers are super cute and intelligent. i spotted them earlier today and i got so sad thinking about people out there wanting to kill them..
kittens, beavers, humans... no one should be killed
no... #savethebeavers pls!
this!!
this is actually scary..
why are you so hateful?
fr the summers have become so goddamn hot, I'm thinking about moving north
I just went on a wikipedia deep dive and holy shit it's true. #savethebeavers wtf
Who the hell wants to kill the beavers? They'd have to take it up with me first. I'm serious.
Actually you should care about the beavers, lots of people do, the beavers are great. We need everyone on our side.
Bro are you seriously suggesting that more cars would be better for the beavers? wtf
Happy to see there is still some decency in this town.
Individualism has poisoned our community
At this point I'm not shocked by this. Of course people are talking about shooting wild animals now. Our community has turned to shit.
Can't give up the online space to the others.
Is this a joke? Because it's not funny. At all.
These people are hopeless

decisions: Does Borbville need more parking lots?
Does Borbville Primary need a new parking lot?
Should the beavers' habitat be used for the new parking lot?
